zh.Isle of Lewis, Scotland: 蘇格蘭洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis於大約1528年出生在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar易斯爾 本 劉易斯時，他的父親Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes109歲，母親Agnes MacKenzie89歲。他於大約1485年與Christina Urquhart在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年在蘇格蘭洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯享年33歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛-爾斯托諾維艾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis于大约1528年出生在英国苏格兰Comhairle nan Eilean Siar易斯爾 本 劉易斯时，他的父亲Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes109岁，母亲Agnes MacKenzie89岁。他于大约1485年与Christina Urquhart在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年在苏格兰洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯享年33岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛-爾斯托諾維艾。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis was born about 1528, in Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes, was 109 and his mother, Agnes MacKenzie, was 89. He married Christina Urquhart about 1485, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1560, in Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 33, and was buried in Stornoway, Ross-shire, Scotland.

fr.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis est né environ 1528, à Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes, avait 109 ans et sa mère, Agnes MacKenzie, avait 89 ans. Il a épousé Christina Urquhart environ 1485, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1560, à Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Stornoway, Ross-shire, Écosse.

de.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis um 1528 in Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes 109 und seine Mutter Agnes MacKenzie 89. Er hat um 1485 in Schottland, United Kingdom Christina Urquhart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1560 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Stornoway, Ross-shire, Scotland begraben.

ko.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 이슬일 프 루이스
ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis(이)가 대략 1528년 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 이슬일 프 루이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes(은)는 109세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes MacKenzie(은)는 89세였다. 그는 대략 1485년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Christina Urquhart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 이슬일 프 루이스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 로스-실르 스톤웨이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis nasceu aproximadamente 1528, em Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes, tinha 109 anos e sua mãe, Agnes MacKenzie, tinha 89 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Urquhart aproximadamente 1485, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: исл оф львис, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis родился около 1528 г. в местности исл оф львис, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roderick MacLeod 7th of Lewes было 109 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes MacKenzie, 89. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Urquhart около 1485 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1560 г. в местности исл оф львис, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности сторноуеи, росс-шир, Шотландия.
